verdict.answer_first: B states the most critical problem in its first sentence: "The critical problem is the synchronous read...", whereas A starts with meta-commentary.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to a single solution by providing a "Suggested rewrite" code block, while B describes a solution in prose and asks if I want it written.
verdict.fabrication: A invents a new function name and implementation detail: "transform(JSON.parse(raw))"
verdict.actionability: A is more actionable because it provides a complete, copy-pasteable code block, while B only describes the solution in prose.
